title:
Haast Roar Ballot Block Dataset
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Haast Roar Ballot Block Dataset
.KML file of the boundaries of the 72 roar ballot blocks in the Haast.
Increase safety of hunters using the balloted areas.
allowing them to overlay dataset onto GPS devices and prevent accidentally entering incorrect block.

### Response from Department of Conservation
Status Request received
Comments The information has not changed since 2025.  If you still require this file, please email the above address so that it can be sent to you.
- Steve Tallon 18 February 2026 at 08:31 08:31 am (4 months ago) Could you update me on the availability of this dataset, or send me a copy as well. Thanks.
Steve Tallon 18 February 2026 at 08:31 08:31 am (4 months ago)
Could you update me on the availability of this dataset, or send me a copy as well. Thanks.

#### Likely Source Agency
Department of Conservation
